name: map-utils
description: Provider-neutral Google Maps and Mapbox geocoding, routing, and map-card MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Geocode, route, matrix, and create map cards.
interface.longDescription: Adds provider-neutral map_utils tools backed by one active Google Maps or Mapbox credential for geocoding, reverse geocoding, routes, distance matrices, and open-web map-card output.
defaultPrompt: Geocode these addresses and show a map card.
Find a route and create a map card.
